zh.Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓
zh.Seton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Ki: 英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓
zh.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton,於1305年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓。他於1329年與Lady Catherine Sinclair在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年7月19日在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton,于1305年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓。他于1329年与Lady Catherine Sinclair在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年7月19日在苏格兰貝維其可爾享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Seton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton, was born in 1305, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. He married Lady Catherine Sinclair in 1329, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 19 July 1333, in Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton, est né en 1305, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Sinclair en 1329, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1333, à Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton, wurde 1305 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren. Er hat 1329 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland Lady Catherine Sinclair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1333 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Berwickshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton, è nato il nel 1305 nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Sinclair nel 1329, nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 19 luglio 1333, nel Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton,は1305年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで生まれた。1329年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアでLady Catherine Sinclairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年7月19日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton,(은)는 1305년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 태어났다. 그는 1329년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 Lady Catherine Sinclair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 7월 19일 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton, nasceu em 1305, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Sinclair em 1329, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1333, em Berwickshire, Scotland, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton, родился в 1305 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Sinclair в 1329 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июля 1333 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William Seton, nació en 1305, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Se casó con Lady Catherine Sinclair en 1329, en Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 19 de julio de 1333, en Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 28 años.
